title: Talents
description: Talent Expansion adds a powerful talent system with custom combat, defense, and survival upgrades. Unlock and level up abilities using craftable Talent Crystals to enhance your gameplay experience.
body:
![Talents Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ced52b2b02cac161584a8383126ba64c90ceec.png)

Check out Talents on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/talents-fabric)

# 🧠 Talent Expansion – Master Combat, Defense, and Survival with Unique Talents!

Talent Expansion adds a customizable talent tree system to Minecraft, giving players the power to unlock and level up abilities using Talent Crystals — special items crafted by surrounding a Nether Star with Emeralds.

## 🔹 How It Works:

- Unlock talents by spending Talent Crystals, which can be crafted using 8 Emeralds surrounding 1 Nether Star

- Open the Talent GUI with the V key (customizable in Controls → Key Binds) to view and manage your talent tree.

![Talents GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4be50db428456e9b3bc635f29bbbd5fb9d3fd26.png)

- Talents can be leveled up to increase their effectiveness, with some requiring one prerequisite talent.

- Hover over each talent to display its name & when clicked makes the Unlock Talent Button visible which is used to unlock the selected talent.

---

### 🗡️ Combat Talents

**Attack (Root for Fire Sword & Blow)** – Boosts sword damage.

**Fire Sword** – Melee hits set enemies on fire.

**Quick Sword Hit** – Faster sword attack speed.

**Armor Penetration** – Sword attacks ignore some armor.

**Thunder** – Summons lightning on hit.

**Blow** – Arrows pierce armor.

**Critical Arrow** – Increased arrow crit chance or damage.

**Multishot** – Shoot multiple arrows simultaneously.

**Flame** – Sets targets on fire with arrows.

---

### ✨ Special Talents

**🩸 Life Steal** – Gain health when dealing damage.
🧬 Requires either any of these: Thunder and Flame.

**☠ Resilience** – Reduces duration and strength of negative status effects.
🧬 Requires either any of these: Heal and Thorns.

---

### 🛡️ Defense Talents

**Armor (Root for Knockback Resistance and Featherfall)** – Increases armor defense.

**Knockback Resistance** – Reduces knockback taken.

**Tough Armor** – Additional defense boost.

**Health Boost** – Increases max health.

**Heal** – Heals more when hunger is full.

**Featherfall** – Greatly reduces fall damage.

**Protection** – General damage reduction from all sources.

**Shield** – Chance to auto-block damage with a shield.

**Thorns** – Chance to damage attackers.


This mod is also available on CurseForge as well.

Leave any suggestions to improve the mod, or found a bug? Report [here](https://github.com/CobraGamingSj/Talents-1.21.4/issues)
